segments.text: It is a very important turning point, as you know that every 21st day we change our calendars
as far the horoscope is concerned.
And so now, there's a new change has to come
and you can see that announcement
You understand an awareness of very new dimension
So far dealing with collective consciousness
we are collectively conscious
We have idea
That we are collectively conscious
Also know
know we are part and parcel of the whole. And that,
We all our Sahaja Yogis
.We knew about our chakras
,and our nadis very clearly
..we do not known out powers
How many power have developed in those 21 years within yourself?
Last two months Italy was burning with fire
It is so very hot
I read reports
that they are worried about the drought,
and want rain to come in.
And now we think time has passed away!
But how it works?
You see because
The All-pervading Power
knows everything
–and whole nature works for your benefit
For Your programs
At right times things happen as you have seen before
They're completely coordinated
with our programs
All the time they are helping you.
Whatever have in themselves as powers,
They're using them at right times
Now be confident that
You've got powers
And this is a new change
That's going to come
Within your own understanding
So far only if you knew
That could feel vibrations
You could cure people, you could help to cure, I mean still not so confidently.
That uh..you would feel the Param Chaitanya
but it did no know what dynamic forces are working in you now
and this is a new change that's going come
with these few changes
we have to assume any character
And then your character is announcement
So far I've told you not to talk about Sahaja Yoga very openly, blatantly but now the time has come.
We waited long for these days and we have to all start talking about it, announcing
And telling everyone otherwise world would say that they never knew
False gurus are so well known all over because their disciples
are talking about them all the places wherever they can to other big offices
They go make people a goal. We go toward important people
Just go and tell that what they have
So far we had kept sahaja yoga at low end
because I wanted you first of all to develop into really very
beautiful Sahajogis so that from your life
From Your lifestyle
From your behavior, from you understanding
and thoughts people will realize
that these are very unique
a different type of person.
Now this assumption has to be there
You have understand
That all the powers are bubbling in
And just out formality
or maybe out shyness
or maybe little cowardice, you are hiding them.
The other day there was a Sahaja Yogi who came to my house
and he saw some flowers which were fading away
I said they're not fading
You can give them life
He said now
i said cut the bottom of all up
And put your hand underneath
Take these children away
Just don't put here as well
and he just put his hands under the mace of the stem.
He said, Mother they are still drooping I said all right now leave them in water
His attention was here & there within 15 days
They all stood up alright
started growing
became bigger flowers
lasted for 5 more after that
then it was convinced
You can do so many things
Convince yourself that you have these powers.
I've seen people who had certain problems,
they are having a headache
They're this and then come to Me
Write big letters
Mother!I get my headaches
You can't get rid of it
Now those days is gone
When mother has to cure her headache
Look after your wife
look out for children
It's all finished now
Now you are responsible, not only for yourself but
For your ashrams ,for cities
Your countries and the whole world.
Now assume your powers
Like yesterday he sang this or played the royal court
So now we're in a Royal Court
Take up your responsibilities
Everybody has to feel responsible
and assume what you are, know your powers.
What can do? Sit down!
Now the days have gone when
You had to sit-down
And count Your blessings
now
We've got to count our powers
How many powers I'm here
and how much I could use
No use counting miracles
Have we enough miracles
To prove that you're Sahaja Yogis
That you were helped by Param Chaitanya
But now know how much of that parvachaitanya you are going to use yourself,
How your'e gonna maneuver it and
And this is the new era we're starting from today.
This day I was waiting for all
To realize
That
You aren't sahaja yogis only for your selfishness
Nor
For your families
nor
Your communities
not for your country but the whole world, expand yourself.
You must have that vision before you
That I've put many a times
Before new people
Now don't have diffidence
First of all
We are very ordinary
we haven got something special about it
This work is not going to be done by special people
because they are suffering from ego.
It is going to be done by people who don't have that ego
of great success or
of great achievements, riches and anything
If there are rid off this then only
can work it out
And thats why its for you
To understand what Christ has said
That a camel
Can pass through
the whole of a needle, but not a rich man.
Because an ego is too big – bigger than camel or elephant
any animal you could think on it!
That's why now as we are entering into new awareness
let us start worrying about our negative thinking
So first thing is the defiance
How can I be?
I am not all right,I was like this, I was doing
Like these. So many letters
Of confessions come to Me pages after page which I throw away
There is no need to confess anymore there's only one
Confession that i'm a sahaja yogi and now after 21st
of Sahasrara i'am maha-yogi This the confession you have
To make And know more about out date things
that people tell Me about your family's life,
all mundane nonsensical things.
We have given them up and we've come to Sahaja Yoga for our ascent
– they achieved their ascent
And now? For what?
What has achieved the ascent is
emancipate human beings
help out of the mire
of ignorance or darkness
The main target I feel today
should not be so much political as fundamentalism.
So we have to openly say
that you are nonsensical,
You don't know the truth
and anything about truth
or that there is a power working
very clearly
all stupid people running after something
which is mirage
will end up in hell
described by scriptures
We must openly say
These things, whichever way you like. You may write books
or publish it and tell people about them
but now the new announcement has to come
saying that running after falsehood is not going
take me to God. In fact they have used
a power of hatred so we believe in
The Power Of Love
And Not in The Power Of Hatred
That YOU believe in
For us everybody
Is capable
of finding the truth and is capable
to get into heaven
or that paradise which is promised
us, in a kingdom of God.
So for everybody whether they belong
this community ,that community
this race . whatever it be
we believe not that but
are sure
That all
quite capable
and blessed by God that we should enter into His Kingdom.
If you take this kind of a positive attitude,
your negativity will go away
Negative forces as You know have been pulled down
By these kinds or things
Especially after Sahaja Yoga
Before sahaja yoga We were not attached to any families
After sahajyoga You just got attached
Your family is like glued to them
Absolutely glued
I had solve everybody's family problem
Now we have marriages and even the after-marriages I find still people don't understand what is a Sahaja Yoga marriage.
And there are some problems, very few but they're all.
So this nonsensical problem of my family –
My wife ,My children .My house
..my property..My money
All these my should be finished first off
You had to belong in world
Any person who's a king does not belongs his kingdom
is a failure, he's useless.
If He thinks about Himself
About His own comfort
About his own fame
About his own achievements
Then HE'S A FAILURE
He has to think
About the country
On which He's ruling
In same way you have also
Turn your mind away
From all these petty things that
You've been dealing with
I'm struggling trying
Nonsensical things and many people said that mother why should you worry? You are a saint. Why shouldn't you worry about these two
I Said unless an antique is entanglements have taken away
They're not going to come on but now
Now, do feel
That freedom complete free
Your end user your absolutely
And the source of pure joy is just ready
You are not entangled with anyone, you're not anywhere attached to anyone.
In that detachment we have going nourish everyone
inclusive of so called your family
the people
Your country and ultimately the world
So
get rid off negativity first
important thing is learn detachment
Detachment comes through thoughtless awareness
When look at any one or start thinking about a new one
get to your state of thoughtless awareness.
Immediately you'll feel detached and
will know the solution for that whole problem
Now,the greatest power is in your brain
That's where knowledge is
Not knowledgeable the way you understand
what are the chakras or center
not there
But this all knowledge within
Just you have
Get into thoughtlessness
And the whole library of knowledge can open
You know, so many of you have never been speaking on the stage – they are stage fear and
we've become great speakers.
So may people who couldn't even stand before Me now became leaders
in every field that you find that you're advanced
So many people who never knew how to sing have started singing,
did not know how paint has starting painting.
But these are very-very mundane things
which may give us little pleasures here and there
but the main thing is
How Many People We Give Realization To?
Whether you're a woman whether it's your mother
or if You Are A Father
Or If Your Mother
Whether It Is A Child
Or A Girl
Everybody Has To See
how many people we can give Realization to,
How much We Can Announce About Sahaja Yoga.
That's the main thing.
Sahaj yoga is not by-the way and it happens
like when I went into Australia
i was surprised that sahaja yoga
which such a prime thing for them
suddenly became By The Way
So sahaja yoga Is A Commitment
It' s a commitment
And complete involvement
Otherwise you are really useless
For sahaja yoga absolutely useless
It's better to have few people who are committed than to have thousands,
Who aren't just useless.
So let us see what you've decided for yourself
and What You Have Decided For Sahaja Yoga
If you're deciding to opt for Sahajyoga
then Just know that this is the main thing which we have to do
The whole attention should be on That
As I told This morning
a very good poem written by Nama Deva
I was included in the Guru Granth Sahib,
that a boy is playing with his kite and
this kite flying there. He's talking to everyone
but His attention on the kite
There are ladies who do all household work
She does cleaning
But her child is on her back or waist
All Her attention is of the child
Then there're ladies taking water home
There is some water which are on their heads, sometimes two and sometimes three.
They're carrying balancing it in you
they talking to each other laughing
the whole attention of balance
In same way your attention should be
all time on Sahaja Yoga
What's happening at Sahajyoga?
Where I am going ?
where his mother
what part she is
What is she doing? That, now if you put your attention to
Your negativity will absolutely disappear because
Attention which was involved into negative things
Will get absolutely detached and
You start thinking about Sahaja Yoga.
So Now as you are Mahayogis we have
To make it a Mahayoga
And unless or until that level is achieved by you
Then We should think then we're still back dated
and I don't know, in the turning of wheel how many will be left.
So this is a very big turning point
And today it's great day for us because Sahasrara has completed its twenty-one years
And like that it has twenty-one aspects, seven the chakras and seven into three of your nadis.
These twenty one aspect you have been able to achieve at 21 powers

Don't doubt yourselves
Just experiment

now don't doubt yourself and just go full ahead

except

and also of behavioural maryadas.

,you live the way You want to eat
but main maryada is that
we have very moral people honest moral
And also

In appearance and behaviour such
A person that you do not become obnoxious
or people don't think your queer strange
People. To overcome

And away
That is rather more appealing
For the general public
As people see us as normal human being
and has not abnormality.
There's no much to be done outside, it is the inside
where we'll have prepare ourselves fully
To accept our selves
tell us self every day
that We are now maha yogis
And work out in this way
Today here people from all over the world
You go on telling this message
All rest of them
whom I haven't met
Mother already announced
through Vishnumaya also
that you all have become now Mahayunis,
and try to express them. Manifest with full confidence in yourself
And this power of love I'm sure it will all be over.
May God bless You!

Aum Mata Jincha Sanghe Dharma Bigha Dhalom
Harma Bigha Dhalav Vishwa Dharma Jala
Dharamabhiga dhala, Vishwa dharma dhala.
Abhi bhiga dhalo tum abhi bhiga dhal o tum bhe vigha dhal
Sajincha sange jana bhiga dhale
Majincha sang e pad bhiga dhale
Sang je jana bhiga dhale
Jhana bhiga dhale nirmala chitale
